info.title: Gramps Web API
info.description: The Gramps Web API is a REST API that provides access to family tree databases generated and maintained with Gramps, a popular Open Source genealogical research software package.

get.summary: Get OIDC logout URL for the specified provider.
get.description:
Returns the end_session_endpoint URL from the provider's OIDC discovery document.
If the provider doesn't support logout, returns None for graceful degradation.

post.summary: Handle backchannel logout request from OIDC provider.
post.description:
The provider sends a logout_token (not an id_token) as a form parameter.
We validate it and revoke all tokens for the user's session (sid) or subject (sub).

parameters.description: Comma-delimited profile sections to include for matching objects. Possible values: all, age, self, span, events, families, references.

parameters.name: strip
parameters.description: If true, strip keys with empty values from the response.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of object types to include (e.g. 'person,family,source').

parameters.name: change
parameters.description: ISO-8601 timestamp filter (prefix with '>' or '<') to filter by last-change date.

parameters.name: full
parameters.description: If true, perform a full reindex; otherwise incremental.

parameters.name: semantic
parameters.description: If true, use semantic (vector) search rather than full-text search.

parameters.name: background
parameters.description: If true, process the chat in the background and return HTTP 202.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: If true, include detailed agent metadata (tool calls, token usage) in the response.

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: If true, return the file as an attachment (forces download).

parameters.name: jwt
parameters.description: JWT token for download authentication (used when the browser fetches the file directly).

parameters.name: uploadmissing
parameters.description: If true, upload a missing file for an existing media object without modifying the object record.

put.summary: Upload a file and update the media object.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Tesseract language code for OCR (e.g. 'eng', 'deu').

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format: 'string' (default), 'data', 'boxes', or 'hocr'.
